title: Request to Update Email Address / Login Username
description: Steps for customers to reset their password through the rainGO app.

title: Order Management
description: This article covers order-related enquiries for new service orders, including order statuses, delivery updates, order cancellations, returns, and RICA-related delivery issues.

title: Promise to Pay
description: Procedure for handling billing and payment options concerns.

title: Migration Order
description: Migration orders are created when an existing customer upgrades or downgrades their current service or subscription. Orders processed for service changes will appear on the Order Portal.

title: Simple Troubleshooting Steps
description: This guide provides agents with a step-by-step process to troubleshoot customer reports of slow speeds, unstable connection, or no connectivity on the 5G service. Follow these steps: Account Status - Check if the customer is normal or in arrears. Online/Offline - Check if the customers device is online or offline. Regular vs Current Site - Check if the customer is still on their regular site, and its status. Speeds - Check if the device is getting the speeds it should. 2.4GHz or 5GHz WiFi - Check which wifi network the client device is connected to.
